title: Ops managers manually reconcile failed exports every morning
text: Every morning our ops manager spends 45 minutes exporting failed orders, copying rows into a spreadsheet, and checking errors before support can reply. The workaround is manual and it creates customer risk when we miss a failed export.

title: Weekly invoice handoff requires copy paste between tools
text: Each week the finance lead copies invoice data between three tools because the handoff breaks on edge cases. It takes 2 hours, causes billing mistakes, and the team keeps a spreadsheet checklist as a workaround.
